failedAssertions.reason: Token header shows icon/name/ticker and monospace price, but no 24h percentage change is rendered.
Stats grid is present, but Market cap and Total supply remain '--' instead of populated values.
On reload, chart area did not show a visible chart skeleton/shimmer loading state before empty-state rendering.
Transactions and swap quote placeholders render, but chart and stats area showed empty/fallback content instead of skeleton shimmer placeholders during capture.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No candle data returned, so line/gradient positivity rendering cannot be validated.
Hover tooltip/crosshair and header hover-price update cannot be validated without candle points.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Validation Concurrency section with max concurrent agent-browser validators set to 3.
Added Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser section for isolation rules and evidence expectations.
Documented local empty-candles behavior and recommended browser-level API blocking for isolation-safe API-unavailable tests.
